lineDescription: 60x240mm - 4 Kinds||Size: 60mm x 240mm||Material: PP60 - Permanent||Print Colour: CMYK||Tool: D0836(6,4)(0,1)0.6mm Rectangle||Provided on 76mm Cores||Finishing: MATTE LAMINATE||HAND APPLIED||Supply: *** PLEASE KEEP BLANKS ON ROLLS TO MINIMUM ***||Qty: 1,000||250 x Cleanse soup||250 x Noodle soup||250 x Pumpkin curry||250 x Immune Broth||Group discount applied||
